introSection: Crazy Mouse was a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Tobu Zoo Park in Minami, Saitama, Saitama, Japan. It was the first TOGO Wild Mouse to have only one inversion.
fullText: Crazy Mouse was a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Tobu Zoo Park in Minami, Saitama, Saitama, Japan. It was the first TOGO Wild Mouse to have only one inversion.
